Plaintiff Beth Karpfinger'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Piper Morrison of Zacks & Freedman telephone number 415-956-8100 for Plaintiff.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Beth Karpfinger's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions - Plaintiff's motion for a further production of documents is unopposed and granted. Defendant's response to Document Request No. 1 included multiple objections. Based on defendant's non-opposition to the motion said objections other than for privilege are overruled. The documents produced relating to Document Requests Nos. 2, 3, 4,5, 6, 7, 8, 12, 13 and 14, are asserted to be incomplete. The completeness of the responses to these requests should have been resolved through the "meet and confer" process which was attempted by the moving party in detailed letters. The defendant's attorney agreed in an email dated December 31, 2015 to provide a further response within a week but failed to do so. The motion was filed on January 14, 2016. The defendant shall respond to Request No. 1, without objection, within twenty days of service of the order to be entered herein with Notice of Entry. The defendant shall provide all documents in her care, custody and control responsive the Document Requests Nos. 2, 3, 4,5, 6, 7, 8, 12, 13 and 14 within the same time frame. A further verified response shall accompany the documents which set forth for each category that the production is complete. Monetary sanctions are awarded against the defendant and her counsel in the sum of $1,200.00 to be paid at the same time as the additional responses are served. Order signed in open Court.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiff Beth Karpfinger'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
